---
image: img.jpg
title: Urban and socio-economic correlates of property prices in Dublin area
author: Damien Dupré
description: GoutAI Seminars at Rennes School of Business
date: '2021-11-19'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

GoutAI Seminars at Rennes School of Business

:::
